info.description: A form section (newsletter signup or contact). Uses HubSpot ids either from the linked Form or typed directly below.

theme.description: Colour style: light, dark, or deep (blue band).

variant.description: Layout: 'inline' (fields side by side, used by the newsletter row) or 'stacked'.

portalId.description: HubSpot Portal ID (optional if a Form is linked below).

formId.description: HubSpot Form ID (optional if a Form is linked below).

fields.description: The fields shown in the form, in order.

form.description: Optional link to a saved HubSpot Form (an alternative to typing the ids above).
